subject: Fwd: Fw: Chaos Intellect 10.7 and Time and Chaos 10.7 now available
body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: a hud <antonio@performancepos.com>
Date: Fri, Apr 24, 2026 at 9:43 AM
Subject: Fw: Chaos Intellect 10.7 and Time and Chaos 10.7 now available
To: antonio.hudnall@gmail.com <antonio.hudnall@gmail.com>,
performacedepot@gmail.com <performacedepot@gmail.com>




----- Forwarded Message -----
*From:* Chaos Software <chaos-news@chaossoftware.com>
*To:* A Hudnall <antonio@performancepos.com>
*Sent:* Tuesday, January 13, 2026 at 03:09:28 PM PST
*Subject:* Chaos Intellect 10.7 and Time and Chaos 10.7 now available

[image: Chaos Software Group Inc]
<https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=BoTAm&m=IpWX8fyQ9E7ZhD&b=WdTf__c.cpJEZCF9_SNpYA>

January 13, 2026

Hello again from Chaos Software!

We've released a new version of Chaos Intellect and Time & Chaos this past
week: 10.7.0.0

For Chaos Intellect users, this update primarily affects the email preview
window where you read your incoming mail. We've updated this preview window
to use Microsoft's updated WebView2 HTML engine versus the prior and now
discontinued Microsoft WebView HTML engine used by older versions of
Intellect. This has the tradeoff of requiring Windows 10 or 11 with
Microsoft Edge installed, but will continue to work even after Microsoft
finishes removing the old WebView engine from current versions of Windows.

The email preview window is on the main mail view of Chaos Intellect,
usually below the message list. When you highlight a message on the list
above, it shows you the message content in the preview window below.

Please note that Microsoft Edge does NOT need to be your default web
browser, nor even a browser that you actually use, so we are not asking you
to switch from a different browser if you use one. You just can't have gone
to the trouble of choosing to hunt down and remove the Microsoft Edge
browser that came built in to Windows in the first place or you will have
removed the WebView2 HTML engine that Intellect 10.7 is trying to use.

Besides the update to the email preview screen, there are some
miscellaneous minor updates and fixes in other places too.

We've updated Time and Chaos to version 10.7 also to include these same
updates and fixes outside of the email features, but it is just Chaos
Intellect that drops support for older versions of Windows.
Don't own a license for version 10 yet?

If you own a prior generation of one of these programs and have not yet
purchased a license for version 10, we do offer discounted pricing for our
long-time users! The Purchase link at the top of
https://www.chaossoftware.com
<https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=BoTAm&m=IpWX8fyQ9E7ZhD&b=WdTf__c.cpJEZCF9_SNpYA>
has an option for Upgrading User where you can enter your prior version's
registration info to qualify for our special upgrade prices.
How to update your software?

If you already have a license for version 10 and have it running on your
computer, you can go to Help, Check for Newer Version to have the program
help you update the version.

You can also go to our web site at https://www.chaossoftware.com
<https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=BoTAm&m=IpWX8fyQ9E7ZhD&b=WdTf__c.cpJEZCF9_SNpYA>
and download the setup file from the Products and Downloads page.

Either route has the same end result!
Need more help?

If you need additional help for something in Legal Billing, Chaos
Intellect, Time & Chaos or ChaosHost.com, don't forget we have training
videos (Chaos University), written documentation (Help Files) and a
searchable knowledge base (Frequently Asked Questions), all at
https://www.chaossoftware.com/support/
<https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=BoTAm&m=IpWX8fyQ9E7ZhD&b=CLqd4VYp1.FMF9E0mDzmGQ>.
If you can't find the answers you need online with these resources, you can
submit a question to me through the support web site as well.

Best regards,

Bill Tiede
Chaos Software Group, Inc.
https://www.chaossoftware.com
<https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=BoTAm&m=IpWX8fyQ9E7ZhD&b=I3CMjhYDlgq0WZltAXm1yg>
https://www.chaoshost.com
<https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=BoTAm&m=IpWX8fyQ9E7ZhD&b=UDmfslhHtv1zVrWCHCe0oA>





Our records indicate that A Hudnall at antonio@performancepos.com requested
and confirmed to be added to our mailing list on February 6, 2020. We are
happy to help remove you from our mailing list if you no longer want news
and updates sent to you, but the quickest way to stop further messages like
this one is to follow this link at the very bottom of this message to
unsubscribe.



Chaos Software Group, Inc.
PO Box 865154
Plano TX 75086-5154
USA

Unsubscribe
